brandDescription: BMW is a prestigious German luxury automobile manufacturer renowned for its sporty performance, elegant design, and cutting-edge technology. With a strong presence in the Indian luxury car market, BMW offers a diverse range of sedans, coupes, and SUVs including the 2 Series Gran Coupe, 3 Series, 3 Series Long Wheelbase, and 5 Series. Each model combines dynamic driving dynamics, premium craftsmanship, and innovative features that define the ultimate driving experience.

models.name: BMW 2 Series Gran Coupe 218 M Sport
models.description: The BMW 2 Series Gran Coupe is a stylish and sporty four-door coupe that combines dynamic performance with everyday practicality. Powered by a responsive Twin Turbo petrol engine, the 2 Series delivers an engaging driving experience with impressive fuel efficiency. Its sleek design, premium interior, and advanced technology features make it a compelling choice in the luxury compact segment.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Aluminium Graphite, Widescreen Curved Cockpit Plus, M Aerodynamics Package, BMW Individual High-Gloss Shadow Line, M Sport Brakes, Adaptive LED Headlight
M Illuminated Aluminium Hexacube, Widescreen Curved Cockpit Professional, M Aerodynamics Package, BMW Individual High-Gloss Shadow Line, M Sport Brakes, Adaptive LED Headlight

models.name: BMW 3 Series M340i xDrive
models.description: The BMW 3 Series M340i xDrive is the performance flagship of the 3 Series lineup, combining exhilarating power with precise handling. Powered by a turbocharged inline-6 engine and featuring BMW's xDrive all-wheel-drive system, the M340i delivers breathtaking acceleration and dynamic driving dynamics. With its sporty design, luxurious interior, and advanced technology, it offers the ultimate driving experience.

specifications.additionalFeatures: BMW Individual Headliner Anthracite, Electrical seat adjustment for driver and passenger with memory function, Floor mats in Velour, Front armrest with storage compartment, Interior mirrors with automatic anti-dazzle function, Ambient lighting with Welcome Light Carpet, Through loading system, Sport seats for driver and front passenger, Storage compartment package, Individual trim finisher in Carbon Fibre, Alcantara Sensatec combination Black, contrast stitching Blue, Harman Kardon Surround Sound, Widescreen Curved Display, BMW Operating System 8.0

models.name: BMW 3 Series Long Wheelbase 320Ld M Sport Pro
models.description: The BMW 3 Series Long Wheelbase is a premium luxury sedan that offers enhanced rear-seat comfort and spaciousness. Powered by a refined TwinPower Turbo diesel engine, the 3 Series delivers excellent fuel efficiency and a smooth driving experience. With its extended wheelbase, premium interior, and advanced technology, it is designed for those who value both performance and comfort.

specifications.additionalFeatures: Floor mats in Velour, Ambient lighting with Welcome Light Carpet, Galvanic embellisher for controls, Storage compartment package, Instrument panel in Sensatec, Comfort enhanced Seats in Front and Rear, Black High gloss and Aluminium combination, Widescreen Curved Display, M Aerodynamics package, BMW Individual High-Gloss shadow line, M door sill finishers, Active Air Stream Kidney Grille

models.name: BMW 3 Series Long Wheelbase 330Li M Sport 50 Jahre Edition
models.description: The BMW 3 Series Long Wheelbase 50 Jahre Edition is a special edition luxury sedan that celebrates 50 years of BMW M performance. Powered by a powerful TwinPower Turbo petrol engine, it delivers thrilling performance and dynamic handling. With its exclusive design elements, premium interior, and advanced technology, it offers a unique and collectible driving experience.

models.name: BMW 5 Series 530Li
models.description: The BMW 5 Series is a premium executive sedan that embodies luxury, performance, and sophistication. Powered by a refined petrol engine, the 5 Series delivers a smooth and responsive driving experience. With its elegant design, spacious and luxurious cabin, and advanced technology features, the 5 Series sets new benchmarks in the executive sedan segment.

models.name: BMW X1 sDrive18i M Sport
models.description: The BMW X1 is a premium compact SUV that combines sporty performance with practical versatility. Powered by the B38 turbo petrol engine delivering 134.10 bhp and 230 Nm of torque. Features include 10 Airbags, BMW Live Cockpit Plus, and a luxurious interior.

specifications.safetyFeatures: 10 Airbags, ABS with EBD, Brake Assist, ESC, ISOFIX, Global NCAP Safety Rating 5 Star
